# terrible_cloudscale_ch_cloud_server (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bulk_volume_size_gb` (Number) Size of the bulk storage volume in GB. No bulk storage volume if not set.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `flavor` (String) Flavor of the server.
- `force` (Boolean) Allow to stop the running server for updating if necessary.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `image` (String) Image used to create the server.
- `interfaces` (String) List of network interface objects specifying the interfaces to be attached to the server. See https://www.cloudscale.ch/en/api/v1/#interfaces-attribute-specification for more details.
- `name` (String) Name of the Server. Either *name* or *uuid* are required.
- `password` (String) Password for the server.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `server_groups` (String) List of UUID or names of server groups.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `ssh_keys` (String) List of SSH public keys. Use the full content of your .pub file here.
- `state` (String) State of the server.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `use_ipv6` (Boolean) Enable IPv6 on the public network interface.
- `use_private_network` (Boolean) Attach a private network interface to the server.
- `use_public_network` (Boolean) Attach a public network interface to the server.
- `user_data` (String) Cloud-init configuration (cloud-config) data to use for the server.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the server. Either *name* or *uuid* are required.
- `volume_size_gb` (Number) Initial size of the root volume in GB. This parameter has no effect on existing servers. Use the volume module to change the size of the root volume.
- `zone` (String) Zone in which the server resides (e.g. `lpg1` or `rma1`).

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `href` (String) API URL to get details about this server
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `ssh_fingerprints` (String) A list of SSH host key fingerprints. Will be null until the host keys could be retrieved from the server.
- `ssh_host_keys` (String) A list of SSH host keys. Will be null until the host keys could be retrieved from the server.
- `volumes` (String) List of volumes attached to the server
